title: Swarming worktree dispatch protocol: isolation param, branch report, integration step, disposition table
action: Per D1/D3 (decisions 42a01cfd/649d91b3/5f05b038): (1) swarming SKILL.md wave-dispatch step: on Claude Code, a multi-worker wave (>=2 concurrent workers) dispatches each worker with the Agent tool's isolation: worktree; solo lanes and single-worker waves keep the shared checkout. (2) swarming-reference worker prompt template: add a Worktree contract block (used only for worktree dispatch): 'you work in your own git worktree; coordination store resolves to the main checkout automatically; report your branch name (git branch --show-current) in the [DONE] result fields'. Replace the aspirational line ~71 with the real protocol. (3) Tend/goal-check gains the INTEGRATION step: on [DONE] from a worktree worker — merge the reported branch into the main working branch (plain merge, worker commit identity preserved); a conflict = halt that cell (typed integration failure, cell blocked, friction filed, investigate — NEVER the worker rescue ladder, never force-resolve); then re-run the cell verify in the MAIN checkout (cell counts only on post-merge green); then cleanup (git worktree remove if still present + git branch -d). (4) Disposition table (D3): [BLOCKED]/[HANDOFF] worktrees preserved with path+branch recorded in the cell trace; removal only after re-completion or explicit drop, logged; feature close prunes only merged-or-logged leftovers under .claude/worktrees/. (5) worker-details.md Atomic Commit section: note the branch-report field for worktree dispatch. Keep every edit in the files' existing voice.

truths: the prompt template's worktree block instructs the branch report and nothing else new
the integration step states merge -> conflict-halts -> post-merge verify -> cleanup, in that order
the disposition table covers DONE/BLOCKED/HANDOFF/abandoned and never discards uncommitted work silently
no prose contradicts reservations remaining the file-ownership primitive (D1)
artifacts: edited sections in the three files
prohibitions: making worktree dispatch mandatory for any lane
